title: TABC Rule Changes — What Changed in 2026

differences.dallas: $2,500/year for the original Mixed Beverage Permit.
differences.austin: $3,000/year following the 2026 fee schedule adjustment. Budget the higher amount for renewals.

differences.dallas: TABC seller/server certification valid for 2 years.
differences.austin: Certification window unchanged at 2 years — no action needed if your staff is already certified.

differences.dallas: Outdoor alcohol service permitted until 11:00 PM.
differences.austin: Extended to 12:00 AM Friday/Saturday under the 2026 local ordinance — review your beer garden conditions.

differences.dallas: Paper applications mailed to regional office.
differences.austin: All new permit applications must be submitted through the TABC online portal as of 2026.
